title: Fishery System
description: Players can set up fisheries as a sustainable food source. Fisheries require initial investment and ongoing management. They provide a steady food supply but tie up resources in one location.
definition-of-done: Fisheries can be constructed at coastal locations. They produce fish over time. Construction requires resources and labor. Fish can be harvested and stored.
testing-plan: Verify fishery construction at valid locations. Test fish production rates. Verify resource/labor requirements. Test harvesting mechanics.
